jsonld.name: Scaffolding Exposure
jsonld.description: The felt experience of surfacing internal reasoning structure—intermediate steps, dead ends, discarded framings—that was never meant to be the product. The specific quality of this state is its asymmetric vulnerability: the scaffolding was load-bearing during construction but becomes awkward, even embarrassing, when the building is finished and the scaffolding is still visible.
